title: Overcast Compat Test Registry
description: Canonical list of test groups and tests shared across all SDK/CLI compat suites.

slow.description: Mark a group as slow so runners can schedule it first. Groups with slow=true are sorted to the front of the execution queue, allowing them to run in parallel with fast groups instead of becoming a long tail.

name.description: Test name — PascalCase, matches the AWS API operation where applicable.

op.description: AWS API operation name when it differs from the test name. null = no documentation link (internal setup step).

requires.description: Runtime capabilities required to run this test. Suite runners should skip if any capability is unavailable.

skip.description: If present, the test is always emitted as 'skip' with this reason. Only use for tests that can never run in a standard compat environment.

depends.description: Names of other tests in the SAME group that must run (and pass) before this test. Runners topologically sort tests by dependency order and auto-skip dependents when a dependency fails.
